pr.title: Phase 14B: Lightweight rapid-capture workflow optimizations for staff operations
pr.body:
Phase 14B targets lower-friction operational capture in existing staff workflows (attendance, observations, follow-ups, events, FieldOps) while explicitly deferring offline sync, native-mobile runtime, Feed/Inbox, messaging/notifications, and automation. This PR introduces incremental UI/runtime-prefill improvements that preserve current org scoping and authorization boundaries.

- **Attendance rapid-capture in event workflow**
  - Added per-person quick actions in missing-roster attendance lists to prefill attendance status and jump directly to the capture form.
  - Added event-level quick link into FieldOps booking request flow.

- **Context-prefill continuity across capture forms**
  - `notes/new`: when `eventId` is present and `teamId` is empty, team defaults from event context.
  - `tasks/new`: when `sourceNoteId` is selected and `sourceEventId` is empty, source event defaults from note context.
  - `field-ops/bookings/new`: when `eventId` is present, prefill title/time/program/team from event context where available.

- **Dashboard navigation compression for operational capture**
  - Added a dedicated â€śRapid operational captureâ€ť shortcut section (note capture, follow-up capture, attendance lane, FieldOps request).
  - Updated event concern cards to link directly to capture entry points instead of only review surfaces.

- **Phase planning/docs update**
  - Added `planning/PHASE_14B_LIGHTWEIGHT_RAPID_OPERATIONAL_CAPTURE_OPTIMIZATIONS.md` with scope, delivered optimizations, deferred runtime behavior, and validation guidance.
  - Indexed Phase 14B in `planning/README.md`.

```tsx
// Event detail: rapid prefill link into attendance capture form
<Link
  href={`/events/${event.id}?attendancePersonId=${person.id}&attendanceStatus=${AttendanceStatus.PRESENT}#attendance-capture-form`}
  className="underline"
>
  Mark present
</Link>
```
pr.author: Copilot
